name: sign_in_oauth
description: Initiate OAuth sign-in with a third-party provider (Google, GitHub, etc.). Returns the OAuth authorization URL to redirect the user to.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: OAuth provider name: google, github, gitlab, bitbucket, facebook, apple, twitter, discord, etc.

parameters.name: redirect_to
parameters.description: URL to redirect to after OAuth flow completes.

parameters.name: scopes
parameters.description: Space-separated OAuth scopes to request from the provider.
